title: AI agents can manage your passwords. Should we let them? Plus: The biggest Patch Tuesday ever.
summary: A podcast episode examines the feasibility and risks of using AI agents to detect compromised passwords and change them automatically, debates their readiness for deployment, and discusses Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday covering over 200 CVEs as part of a larger shift in vulnerability management practices.
writeup: This IBM Technology podcast episode weighs whether AI agents should detect compromised passwords and change them automatically, debating whether the technology is ready for deployment given the access control and security risks involved. It also covers Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday, which addressed more than 200 CVEs, framing it within a broader shift in vulnerability management practices. The discussion connects agentic automation in credential handling to the growing scale and complexity of patching work.
